findings.description: Exception handling fix audit — VERIFIED: _get_fred_key() at lines 461-470 now logs warnings instead of silent pass. Line 469: logger.warning on ImportError/AttributeError. Line 254: logger.warning when key is not configured. _get_eia_key() at lines 473-482 follows same pattern. No silent key-fetch failures remain.

Broad except Exception at lines 289, 361, 449 in _fetch_fred(), _fetch_cftc(), _fetch_eia(). These catch-all handlers are intentional for graceful degradation (returning {'error': 'source_unavailable'}) and always log a warning. Not ideal but acceptable for external API fetchers where unexpected failures (DNS, TLS, timeout) should not crash the pipeline. Each also has a specific httpx.HTTPStatusError handler before the broad catch.

URL parameter construction for CFTC SODA API at line 313-320 uses LIKE '%{market_filter}%' with string interpolation. market_filter comes from hardcoded _CFTC_ASSETS dict (line 60-81), so no injection risk. However, if _CFTC_ASSETS is ever extended with user-supplied values, this would be an injection vector. The params={'$query': query} approach passes the query as a URL parameter (httpx handles encoding), which mitigates URL injection.

_sanitize_text_fields() at lines 125-138: All string fields in API response dicts are run through sanitize_for_llm_prompt() before caching. This means sanitized data flows to all consumers from cache. Each data source uses a distinct source label (fred_data, cftc_data, eia_data) for traceable warning logs. Full coverage confirmed across all three fetchers.

_redact_url() at lines 501-504: API keys in error messages are replaced with '***' before logging. This prevents key leakage in log files when API URLs with embedded keys appear in exception messages. Covers all three fetchers.

notes: Exception handling improvements confirmed — no silent failures remain. All error paths log warnings or return structured errors. Data sanitization applied before caching (defense-in-depth). API key redaction in error logs prevents credential leakage. The broad except Exception catches are intentional for robust graceful degradation.
